title: 10 best herbal capsules for dry eyes
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for dry eyes are natural supplements that combine various herbs and botanicals to alleviate symptoms of dry eye syndrome. These capsules work by reducing inflammation, moisturizing the eyes, and promoting tear production, providing relief from itchiness, redness, and blurred vision. Examples include flaxseed oil, omega-3 fatty acids, and bilberry extracts. By using these herbal capsules, people with dry eyes can enjoy improved vision, reduced discomfort, and enhanced overall eye health, allowing them to engage in daily activities without irritation or strain.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Eyebright capsules helps with dry eyes because they contain the herb Euphrasia officinalis, which has natural anti-inflammatory properties that soothe and calm irritated eyes. The capsules also help to reduce inflammation and promote healthy tear production, alleviating dryness and itchiness. Additionally, eyebright capsules have been shown to improve eye lubrication and protect against further damage from environmental stressors, making them a natural and effective solution for relieving dry eye symptoms.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant activity: Eyebright capsules contain antioxidants that help neutralize free radicals in the eye, reducing oxidative stress and inflammation that can contribute to dry eye symptoms.

Anti-inflammatory effects: The flavonoids present in eyebright have been shown to reduce inflammation in the eyes, which can help alleviate redness, irritation, and discomfort associated with dry eye.
Lubricating and soothing properties: Eyebright's mucilage content provides a natural lubricant that helps to soothe and moisten the eyes, reducing symptoms of dryness, itchiness, and grittiness.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of eyebright are used in medicinal capsules as they contain a high concentration of bioactive compounds, such as flavonoids and saponins, which help to reduce inflammation and soothe dry eyes.
Buds: Eyebright buds are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties that can help to calm irritated eyes and reduce the discomfort associated with dry eye syndrome.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Plantain capsules helps with dry eyes because they contain a high concentration of allantoin, an anti-inflammatory compound that soothes and calms irritated eyes. The plantain extract in these capsules also possesses potent antioxidant properties, which help to protect the delicate tissues of the eyes from damage caused by free radicals. As a result, herbal plantain capsules can effectively alleviate symptoms of dry eye syndrome, including itchiness, burning, and blurred vision, providing long-lasting relief for individuals suffering from this common condition.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory activity: Plantain contains flavonoids and phenolic acids that have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation in the eyes caused by dry eye syndrome.

Antioxidant effects: Plantain's antioxidant compounds, such as vitamin C and beta-carotene, can protect the eyes from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to dry eye symptoms.

Moisturizing properties: Plantain has been traditionally used to treat skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis, and its moisturizing properties may also help soothe and hydrate the eyes, reducing dryness and discomfort.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, plantain roots help to soothe and calm irritated eyes.
Barks: Containing flavonoids and phenolic acids, plantain barks have been traditionally used to treat eye inflammation and reduce redness.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Butcher's broom capsules helps with dry eyes because it contains a unique combination of bioactive compounds that help to reduce inflammation and improve blood flow to the eyes. The antioxidants present in the capsules also work to neutralize free radicals, which can damage the delicate tissues of the eyes and contribute to dryness and discomfort. By addressing these underlying causes, butcher's broom capsules may provide relief from the burning, itching, and gritty sensation associated with dry eyes, promoting healthy and comfortable vision.
remedy_properties: Ruscogenin: This saponin compound has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the eyes, thus alleviating dry eye symptoms.

Furostanol glycosides: These compounds have been shown to improve blood circulation and reduce vascular constriction, which can help increase tear production and alleviate dryness and irritation in the eyes.

Quercetin: This flavonoid has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the eyes, making it easier for the eyes to produce healthy tears and reducing the sensation of dryness.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the butcher's broom plant contain saponins, which have anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe and calm dry, irritated eyes.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes, or underground stems, of the plant are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids that combat oxidative stress and inflammation in the eyes, alleviating dry eye symptoms.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Annabelle capsules helps with dry eyes because they contain a unique blend of herbs that work together to soothe and nourish the eyes. The combination of herbs such as Eyebright, Goldenseal, and Marshmallow root helps to reduce inflammation and irritation in the eyes, providing instant relief from dryness and itchiness. Additionally, the capsules help to lubricate the eyes, reducing tear evaporation and promoting healthy tear production, resulting in clear and comfortable vision.
remedy_properties: Bilberry extract: Bilberry's anthocyanins have anti-inflammatory properties, which can reduce inflammation and irritation in the eyes caused by dryness, promoting healthy tear production.
Eyebright: Eyebright's anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds can help soothe and calm irritated eyes, reducing redness and discomfort associated with dry eyes.

Marshmallow root: Marshmallow root's mucilage properties can provide lubrication and moisture to the eyes, helping to alleviate dryness and irritation by creating a protective barrier on the surface of the eye.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the Annabelle plant have anti-inflammatory properties, which help soothe and calm irritated eyes.
Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes contain antioxidants and flavonoids, which work together to reduce inflammation and protect the eyes from further damage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Comfrey capsules helps with dry eyes because they contain allantoin, a naturally occurring compound that has been shown to have anti-inflammatory properties. Allantoin is able to penetrate deep into the eye tissue, soothing and calming irritated eyes while also helping to reduce inflammation. This can provide significant relief for individuals suffering from dry eyes, as it helps to promote healthy tear production and reduce redness and discomfort.
remedy_properties: Allantoin: Helps to promote mucilage production in the eyes, which soothes and moisturizes the dry eye surface, reducing inflammation and discomfort.
Rutoside: Has anti-inflammatory properties that reduce redness and swelling associated with dry eyes, while also improving tear quality and reducing evaporation of tears.
Saponins: Have astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which help to calm and protect the eye surface from irritation and inflammation caused by dryness.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in allantoin, a natural soothing agent that helps to reduce inflammation and promote healing in dry eye conditions.
Buds: Containing high levels of rosmarinic acid, a powerful antioxidant that helps to protect the eyes from oxidative stress and damage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Verbena capsules helps with dry eyes because of its unique ability to soothe and calm the eyes. The herb's anti-inflammatory properties reduce redness and irritation, while its antioxidant-rich compounds protect the delicate tissues in the eyes from damage caused by free radicals. Additionally, verbena's natural moisturizing properties help to lock in moisture, alleviating dryness and discomfort associated with dry eye syndrome. As a result, verbena capsules provide a natural and effective solution for promoting healthy, comfortable vision.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Verbena's anti-inflammatory compounds help reduce redness, swelling, and irritation in the eyes associated with dry eye syndrome.
Antioxidant properties: The antioxidant capabilities of verbena capsules help protect the eyes from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to dry eye symptoms.

Soothing and calming effects: Verbena's herbal extracts have a gentle, soothing action that can help calm irritated or inflamed eyes, providing relief from discomfort and itchiness associated with dry eye.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, Verbena roots are effective in reducing inflammation and soothing irritated eyes.
Buds: Containing essential oils with anti-inflammatory properties, Verbena buds help to calm and moisturize dry, itchy eyes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Yarrow capsules helps with dry eyes because they contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The herb has been traditionally used to treat a range of eye issues, including redness, irritation, and itchiness caused by dryness. When taken as a supplement, yarrow capsules can help reduce inflammation in the eyes and promote healthy tear production, alleviating symptoms of dry eye disease such as blurred vision and burning sensations. Additionally, the antioxidant properties may also help protect the eyes from further damage and promote overall ocular health.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Yarrow's antioxidants help neutralize free radicals that can damage eye tissues and contribute to dry eye symptoms, promoting healthier tear production and reducing inflammation.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Yarrow's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as sesquiterpenes and flavonoids, reduce swelling and irritation in the eyes, alleviating discomfort and dryness associated with dry eye syndrome.

Tissue-protective properties: Yarrow's bioactive compounds, including chromenes and coumarins, have been shown to protect and regenerate ocular tissues, promoting healthy tear production and reducing the risk of corneal damage from chronic dryness.
remedy_parts: Roots: Yarrow roots contain a high concentration of flavonoids and terpenes, which help to reduce inflammation and promote healing in the eyes.
Seeds: Yarrow seeds have been traditionally used to treat eye issues due to their rich content of fatty acids and antioxidants, making them effective in soothing dry, irritated eyes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold capsules helps with dry eyes because they contain calendula, a natural anti-inflammatory agent that soothes and calms irritated eyes. The capsules also provide hydration to the eyes, reducing dryness and itchiness caused by lack of moisture. Additionally, calendula's antioxidant properties help protect the eyes from damage caused by free radicals, promoting healthy vision and overall ocular health. As a result, pot marigold capsules offer a natural and effective way to alleviate symptoms of dry eyes, providing relief from discomfort and improving eye function.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Pot marigold contains antioxidants like flavonoids, saponins, and terpenes, which help to neutralize free radicals that can cause oxidative stress and inflammation in the eyes, contributing to dryness and discomfort.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The active compounds in pot marigold capsules have anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce swelling and redness in the eyes caused by dry eye syndrome, promoting healing and comfort.

Wetting agent properties: Pot marigold contains mucilages that have natural wetting and lubricating properties, which can help to moisturize and soothe the eyes, reducing irritation and discomfort associated with dry eyes.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, roots are used to soothe and calm dry, irritated eyes.
Seeds: Containing essential fatty acids and vitamins, seeds help to moisturize and nourish the eyes, reducing dryness and discomfort.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Cornflower capsules helps with dry eyes because they contain the extract of cornflower petals, which have natural anti-inflammatory properties that soothe and calm irritated eyes. The capsules also contain antioxidants that help reduce oxidative stress in the eyes, preventing damage caused by free radicals. Additionally, the herbal extract has been shown to improve eye moisture levels, reducing symptoms of dryness, itchiness, and redness associated with dry eye syndrome.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Cornflower contains flavonoids and terpenes that have anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce redness and discomfort associated with dry eyes.

Antioxidant property: The antioxidants present in cornflower, such as kaempferol and quercetin, can help protect the eyes from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, contributing to healthier eyes and improved tear quality.

Vasodilatory property: Cornflower's vasodilatory effects can help increase blood flow to the eyes, promoting healthy corneal function and improving tear production, which can alleviate dryness and discomfort.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, cornflower roots are valued for their ability to soothe and protect the eyes from damage.
Barks: The barks of the cornflower plant contain compounds that help to reduce inflammation and improve circulation to the eyes, making it effective in alleviating dry eye symptoms.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: German chamomile capsules helps with dry eyes because they contain apigenin, an antioxidant that has anti-inflammatory properties. This soothing compound calms irritated eyes and reduces redness, relieving discomfort caused by dryness. Additionally, chamomile's natural lubricating effects help to moisturize the eyes, reducing the risk of corneal ulcers and promoting healthy tear production. As a result, chamomile capsules provide natural relief from dry, itchy, or burning eyes, making them an effective natural remedy for dry eye syndrome.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory effects: German Chamomile capsules contain apigenin, an anti-inflammatory compound that helps reduce inflammation and irritation in the eyes, alleviating symptoms of dry eyes.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in German Chamomile, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, help neutralize free radicals in the eye tissues, protecting them from damage caused by oxidative stress, a common contributor to dry eyes.

Soothing and calming effects: German Chamomile's calming properties can help relax the muscles around the eyes, reducing tension and discomfort associated with dry eyes, such as burning, itching, or grittiness.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in flavonoids and terpenes, which help to reduce inflammation and soothe dry, irritated eyes.
Flowers: Containing apigenin and bisabolol, these flowers possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can alleviate dry eye symptoms.
